inputs.label: Fence Length
inputs.businessContext: Total linear distance of the fence to be constructed

inputs.label: Post Spacing
inputs.businessContext: Maximum distance between fence posts as per design specifications

inputs.label: Number of Corners
inputs.businessContext: Number of directional changes in the fence line requiring additional corner posts

inputs.label: Number of Gate Openings
inputs.businessContext: Number of gates planned in the fence line; each gate adds posts

inputs.label: Post Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the fence post for concrete volume calculation

inputs.label: Post Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of the post hole for concrete volume calculation
